item.title: Trump-appointed federal judge tosses DOJ lawsuit seeking Arizona voter data
item.description: A Trump-appointed federal judge in Arizona dismissed a Justice Department lawsuit seeking access to the state's voter rolls on Tuesday.

item.title: Republicans eye picking up $400M tab for Trump's ballroom as some Dems open to 'discuss' idea
item.description: GOP senators push $400 million in funding for Trump's White House ballroom after a gunman targeted the White House Correspondents’ Association Dinner.

item.title: House Republican from Florida announces he won't seek re-election this year
item.description: Republican Rep. Daniel Webster of Florida, who has served in the House since 2011, announces he will not run for re-election this year.

item.title: WATCH: Hearing erupts after Dem chair tries to sidestep GOP transgender sports bills: ‘They’re petrified’
item.description: Pennsylvania Republicans say Democrats are petrified of voting on transgender youth sports bills after a chaotic committee hearing broke legislative n...
